2603.28405.title: EdgeDiT: Hardware-Aware Diffusion Transformers for Efficient On-Device Image Generation
2603.28405.paper_summary: Diffusion Transformers (DiT) have established a new state-of-the-art in high-fidelity image synthesis; however, their massive computational complexity and memory requirements hinder local deployment on resource-constrained edge devices. In this paper, we introduce EdgeDiT, a family of hardware-efficient generative transformers specifically engineered for mobile Neural Processing Units (NPUs), such as the Qualcomm Hexagon and Apple Neural Engine (ANE). By leveraging a hardware-aware optimization framework, we systematically identify and prune structural redundancies within the DiT backbone that are particularly taxing for mobile data-flows. Our approach yields a series of lightweight models that achieve a 20-30% reduction in parameters, a 36-46% decrease in FLOPs, and a 1.65-fold reduction in on-device latency without sacrificing the scaling advantages or the expressive capacity of the original transformer architecture. Extensive benchmarking demonstrates that EdgeDiT offers a superior Pareto-optimal trade-off between Frechet Inception Distance (FID) and inference latency compared to both optimized mobile U-Nets and vanilla DiT variants. By enabling responsive, private, and offline generative AI directly on-device, EdgeDiT provides a scalable blueprint for transitioning large-scale foundation models from high-end GPUs to the palm of the user.
2603.28405.paper_summary_zh: 擴散Transformer（DiT）在高保真圖像合成方面建立了新的最先進技術；然而，它們龐大的計算複雜性和內存需求阻礙了在資源受限的邊緣設備上的本地部署。<lb/>在本文中，我們介紹了EdgeDiT，一系列專為移動神經處理單元（NPU）設計的硬體高效生成Transformer，例如高通Hexagon和蘋果神經引擎（ANE）。<lb/>通過利用硬體感知的優化框架，我們系統性地識別並修剪DiT主幹中對移動數據流特別繁重的結構冗餘。<lb/>我們的方法產生了一系列輕量級模型，實現了參數減少20-30%、FLOPs減少36-46%以及設備上延遲減少1.65倍，而不犧牲原始Transformer架構的擴展優勢或表達能力。<lb/>廣泛的基準測試表明，EdgeDiT在Frechet Inception Distance（FID）和推理延遲之間提供了優於優化移動U-Net和普通DiT變體的Pareto最優權衡。<lb/>通過直接在設備上啟用響應式、私密和離線生成AI，EdgeDiT為將大規模基礎模型從高端GPU過渡到用戶掌心提供了一個可擴展的藍圖。
2603.28405.author: Sravanth Kodavanti et.al.
2603.28405.authors: Sravanth Kodavanti, Manjunath Arveti, Sowmya Vajrala, Srinivas Miriyala, Vikram N R
